purpose.question: Can a project-authored, zero-API broad-spectral vowel instrument recognize held-out natural Kokoro source/target categories and provide complementary evidence when short-vowel Praat F1/F2 retention is brittle?
purpose.scientific_boundary: This is a complementary instrument calibration on already frozen audio. It does not rewrite any v8 Praat outcome, prove a precise formant transition, or promote a product rule.
purpose.motivation: Many lexically core v8 failures passed most occurrence analyses and failed on a small number of short-span LPC exclusions or endpoint instabilities. The instrument must earn authority on natural anchors before seeing a controlled candidate classification.

scope.typed_core_definition: Changed rules emitted for at least 100 canonical words by the pinned full wordfreq/G2P inventory; crossed with both selected voices in that source language.

feature_extraction.implementation: Project-authored NumPy-only PCM16 log-mel MFCC trajectory; no learned weights, hosted model, network request, or additional dependency.
feature_extraction.amplitude_handling: Each frame is RMS-normalized, mel power is normalized to its frame maximum, and DCT coefficient zero is omitted.
feature_extraction.temporal_handling: Twelve non-energy MFCCs are linearly sampled at 30%, 50%, and 70% of each frozen stress-plus-vowel interval, producing a 36-dimensional trajectory.
feature_extraction.intervals: Use the immutable v8 source, target, and controlled stress-plus-vowel intervals without boundary search or listening selection.

leave_context_out_validation.heldout_unit: Complete logical carrier slot; both repeated occurrences are held out together.
leave_context_out_validation.scaler: For each heldout occurrence, robust median/MAD scaling uses natural anchors from the same voice in every other logical slot. The heldout slot and all controlled conditions are excluded.
leave_context_out_validation.endpoint_training: Source and target centroids use only the same voice-rule cell's natural anchors from the other two carrier slots.
leave_context_out_validation.cell_validation: At least three of four heldout natural source/target pairs must cross the trained endpoint bisector with exact-category status, and no heldout natural pair may have a negative source-to-target direction cosine.

candidate_classification.eligibility: A controlled cell is classified only when its natural-anchor leave-slot-out validation passes.
candidate_classification.directional: Every one of four controlled neutral/lens occurrences must pass anchor separation, cosine >= 0.5, movement >= 25% of the trained anchor span, target-distance gain, and source-distance departure.
candidate_classification.exact: Every occurrence must additionally move >= 50% of the trained anchor span, leave neutral on the source side, and place lens on the target side of the endpoint bisector.
candidate_classification.identity_negative_control: Controlled neutral compared with itself must produce zero directional passes across all 320 occurrences.
candidate_classification.aggregation: One failed, excluded, or anchor-invalid occurrence fails the complete cell; no favorable occurrence selection is allowed.

global_instrument_sanity.reference_definition: The 12 exact-category and 9 directional-only cells in the immutable v8 Praat result.
global_instrument_sanity.reference_concordance_definition: Natural-anchor validation passes and the spectral controlled candidate is directional-only or exact-category.
global_instrument_sanity.failure_effect: If global sanity fails, the spectral instrument is rejected for this dataset and no spectral cell may supplement product evidence.

claim_limits.complement_not_replacement: Spectral results remain alongside immutable Praat F1/F2 results; they cannot reclassify the v8 record.
claim_limits.category_wording: A pass supports broad spectral-category direction under the frozen instrument, not an exact F1/F2 or phoneme-realization claim.
claim_limits.nasal: MFCC evidence does not establish preserved nasality; every nasal cell remains ineligible until a dedicated nasality gate passes.
claim_limits.rhotic: MFCC evidence does not establish rhoticity; a rhotic cell still requires its existing F3-F2 gate.
claim_limits.product: No spectral result alone authorizes a rule, voice, arbitrary typed input, listener-profile fit, naturalness, or deployment.
claim_limits.future_confirmation: Any proposed evidence supplement must keep these parameters fixed, use unseen typed fixtures, retain all engineering gates, and pass stratified blind human QC.

stopping_rule.instruction: Evaluate every frozen natural and controlled occurrence exactly once. Preserve a failed instrument or cell without threshold changes, feature-family search, fixture substitution, or post-hoc rescue.
